raw_question: 哪些公司的业绩比较好？ | 2025年第三季度，2家中药上市公司中，营业总收入和净利润均排名前十的公司
raw_question_json: [{"Q":"哪些公司的业绩比较好？"},{"Q":"2025年第三季度，2家中药上市公司中，营业总收入和净利润均排名前十的公司"}]

query_plan.question: 2025年第三季度，2家中药上市公司中，营业总收入和净利润均排名前十的公司

sql: WITH ranked_by_revenue AS ( SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, total_operating_revenue, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY total_operating_revenue DESC) AS revenue_rank FROM financials_view WHERE report_period = '2025Q3'), ranked_by_profit AS ( SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, net_profit, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY net_profit DESC) AS profit_rank FROM financials_view WHERE report_period = '2025Q3') SELECT r.stock_code, r.stock_abbr, r.total_operating_revenue, r.revenue_rank, p.net_profit, p.profit_rank FROM ranked_by_revenue r JOIN ranked_by_profit p ON r.stock_code = p.stock_code WHERE r.revenue_rank <= 10 AND p.profit_rank <= 10 ORDER BY r.revenue_rank, p.profit_rank
sql_history: WITH ranked_by_revenue AS ( SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, total_operating_revenue, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY total_operating_revenue DESC) AS revenue_rank FROM financials_view WHERE report_period = '2025Q3'), ranked_by_profit AS ( SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, net_profit, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY net_profit DESC) AS profit_rank FROM financials_view WHERE report_period = '2025Q3') SELECT r.stock_code, r.stock_abbr, r.total_operating_revenue, r.revenue_rank, p.net_profit, p.profit_rank FROM ranked_by_revenue r JOIN ranked_by_profit p ON r.stock_code = p.stock_code WHERE r.revenue_rank <= 10 AND p.profit_rank <= 10 ORDER BY r.revenue_rank, p.profit_rank

meta.source_sql: WITH ranked_by_revenue AS ( SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, total_operating_revenue, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY total_operating_revenue DESC) AS revenue_rank FROM financials_view WHERE report_period = '2025Q3'), ranked_by_profit AS ( SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, net_profit, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY net_profit DESC) AS profit_rank FROM financials_view WHERE report_period = '2025Q3') SELECT r.stock_code, r.stock_abbr, r.total_operating_revenue, r.revenue_rank, p.net_profit, p.profit_rank FROM ranked_by_revenue r JOIN ranked_by_profit p ON r.stock_code = p.stock_code WHERE r.revenue_rank <= 10 AND p.profit_rank <= 10 ORDER BY r.revenue_rank, p.profit_rank

turn_answers.Q: 哪些公司的业绩比较好？

A.content: 您想了解哪些具体的财务指标呢？比如营业总收入、净利润，还是其他指标？

turn_answers.Q: 2025年第三季度，2家中药上市公司中，营业总收入和净利润均排名前十的公司

A.content: 2025年第三季度，在中药上市公司中，营业总收入和净利润均位列前十的公司共有6家，分别是：白云山（营收排名第1，净利润排名第2）、云南白药（营收排名第2，净利润排名第1）、华润三九（营收排名第3，净利润排名第3）、同仁堂（营收排名第4，净利润排名第7）、片仔癀（营收排名第7，净利润排名第5）、以岭药业（营收排名第9，净利润排名第10）。
